name: Golden Payment Center & Service, LLC
description_short: Golden Payment Center & Service offers bill payment services and check cashing in Philadelphia's Oxford Circle neighborhood. Local financial services for residents needing payment processing.
description_long: Golden Payment Center & Service is a small financial services business located in Philadelphia's Oxford Circle neighborhood at 6532 Castor Ave. The company operates as a bill payment service provider, serving the local community with check-cashing and related payment processing services. According to available business listings, the company is categorized as a bill payment service provider within the check-cashing and payment processing industry. The business maintains a physical storefront location and operates under the phone number (215) 743-1012. Limited marketing information is available online, with the primary web presence appearing through a Hubbiz business directory listing rather than a dedicated company website. The company's service model focuses on providing accessible financial transaction services to Philadelphia residents who may need check cashing, bill payment processing, money orders, or similar payment services. What distinguishes Golden Payment Center from larger financial institutions is its local, neighborhood-based presence in Oxford Circle and focus on serving community members with straightforward payment processing needs without requiring bank accounts or extensive credit checks. However, there are significant limitations to note: the company maintains minimal online presence and provides very limited public information about services, fees, or service hours. No customer reviews are available on the directory listing, making it difficult to assess service quality or reputation. The website content does not clearly specify which bill payment services are offered, fee structures, operating hours, or service limitations. Without additional transparent information about pricing, customer service availability, and specific service offerings, consumers should contact the business directly before relying on their services.
pros: Located in accessible Oxford Circle neighborhood at 6532 Castor Ave, Philadelphia
Offers bill payment services for local residents
Physical storefront location for in-person transactions
Appears to provide check cashing services typical of payment centers
Listed in business directory with verified contact information (215) 743-1012
Serves underbanked community members who may lack traditional bank accounts
cons: Minimal online presence and no dedicated company website—only directory listing available
No customer reviews or ratings publicly available to assess service quality
Website content does not specify fees, service hours, or complete service menu
No clear information about which specific bill payment services are supported

best_for: Philadelphia residents in or near Oxford Circle needing check cashing
Unbanked or underbanked individuals requiring bill payment services
Community members preferring local, in-person payment processing
diagnosis: Golden Payment Center & Service is best for Philadelphia residents in the Oxford Circle area who need basic check cashing and bill payment services at a neighborhood location. The main caveat is the near-complete lack of online transparency—consumers should call (215) 743-1012 directly to confirm services, fees, and hours before visiting, as the available information is severely limited.
